title: Election authority cans candidate over criminal record
summary_full: A fairly prominent candidate who was due to stand in the upcoming Latvian parliamentary elections has had his candidacy cancelled over his criminal record, reports the LETA newswire.
summary_public: A fairly prominent candidate who was due to stand in the upcoming Latvian parliamentary elections has had his candidacy cancelled over his criminal record, reports the LETA newswire.

LV.label: positive
